subject: GRB051011: bright nebulae near error box
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <gcncirc@observ.inetcomm.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov,  V.Kornilov,   N.Tyurina, A.Belinski,E.Gorbovskoy,
D.Kuvshinov,  A.Krylov, G.Borisov, A.Sankovich,  V.Vladimirov

Sternberg Astronomical Institute, Moscow Union 'Optic'
MASTER  robotic system (http://observ.pereplet.ru) responded to GRB051011 at 
02:18:22.89 (GCN4082).
There is bright nebulae close to error box.
The echo-effect from dust on line of sight is possible.
The JPG-image     available at
http://observ.pereplet.ru/images/GRB051011/1.jpg  .

This work is supported by RFFI  04-02-16411 grant.
This message can be cited.
